标题: Two more xAI co-founders are among those leaving after the SpaceX merger
内容: Since the xAI-SpaceX merger announced last week, which combined the two companies (as well as social media platform X) for a reported $1.25 trillion valuation - the biggest merger of all time - a handful of xAI employees and two of its co-founders have abruptly exited the company, penning long departure announcements online. 标题: Anthropic says it’ll try to keep its data centers from raising electricity costs
内容: Anthropic is the latest AI company promising to limit the impact its data centers have on nearby residents' electricity bills. The company said it would pay higher monthly electricity charges in order to cover 100 percent of the upgrades needed to connect its data centers to power grids. 标题: Apple keeps hitting bumps with its overhauled Siri
内容: Apple had been reportedly pushing to introduce some big changes to Siri with iOS 26.4, but now the company is planning to introduce them in later versions of iOS, including iOS 26.5 and iOS 27, Bloomberg reports. Nearly a year ago, Apple delayed planned features for Siri that would let it understand your personal context […]

标题: Instagram and X have an impossible deepfake detection deadline
内容: The best methods we currently have for detecting and labelling deepfakes online are about to get a stress test. 标题: Here are the brands bringing ads to ChatGPT

标题: How an ‘icepocalypse’ raises more questions about Meta’s biggest data center project
内容: Donna Collins lives about 20 miles from where Meta's biggest data center is being built, in a house her family has lived in for five generations. Construction has thrown the small agricultural community in North Louisiana into the spotlight as a high-profile example of how the infrastructure behind generative AI could impact nearby residents. 标题: T-Mobile will live translate regular phone calls without an app
内容: T-Mobile is preparing to test a new AI feature that translates live phone calls into more than 50 languages. 内容: On Wednesday, xAI took the rare step of publishing its full 45-minute all-hands presentation to the X platform, making it widely available.

标题: AI inference startup Modal Labs in talks to raise at $2.5B valuation, sources say
内容: General Catalyst is in talks to lead the round for the four-year-old startup, according to our sources.

标题: OpenAI disbands mission alignment team
内容: The team's leader has been given a new role as OpenAI's chief futurist, while the other team members have been reassigned throughout the company.

标题: Apple’s Siri revamp reportedly delayed… again
内容: While the new Siri was expected to launch with the upcoming iOS 26.4 update in March, now, the changes are expected to roll out more slowly over time, reportedly postponing some features until the May iOS update, or even until the release of iOS 27 in September.

标题: Uber Eats launches AI assistant to help with grocery cart creation
内容: Uber Eats launched a new AI feature, “Cart Assistant,” that can automatically add items to your cart based on text or image prompts.

标题: Elon Musk suggests spate of xAI exits have been push, not pull
内容: At least nine engineers, including two co-founders, have announced their exits from xAI in the past week, fueling online speculation and raising questions about stability at Musk’s AI company amid mounting controversy.

标题: Why the economics of orbital AI are so brutal
内容: A 1 GW orbital data center would cost roughly $42.4 billion — almost three times its ground-bound equivalent.

标题: Threads’ new ‘Dear Algo’ AI feature lets you personalize your feed
内容: The platform's new feature lets users tell Threads what they temporarily want to see more or less of in their feed.
